data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: The website uses a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Deployed on Kubernetes, uses Docker containers.

data.title: Single Page Application
data.description: Employs React.js for a dynamic and responsive user experience.
data.technical_spec: Built with React.js, served by a Node.js backend.

data.title: Cloud-Based Hosting
data.description: Utilizes cloud services to ensure high availability and redundancy.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on AWS with S3 and EC2 instances for backend services.

data.title: RESTful API Integration
data.description: The site integrates with internal and external APIs for functionality.
data.technical_spec: Uses RESTful services with JSON data exchange.

data.title: Scalable Data Storage
data.description: Relies on scalable database solutions to handle large volumes of data.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS RDS for relational database management.
